Ethereum price up on April 22, 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Ethereum traded at $2,403.78 at 9:15 a.m. ET on April 22, confirming a $98.74 daily increase from April 21's $2,305.04, amid ongoing Pectra upgrade testing boosting institutional demand and Layer 2 growth.[1][2][4] Bitcoin stood at $78,194.37, up from $75,901.41 the prior day.[1][4] No breaking confirmations on October predictions or
